author: v*****a
free_text: As someone living in the perpetual heat and humidity place, finding a cushion foundation that delivers on coverage without melting off or feeling like a heavy mask is a constant challenge. Shade 03A Almond is a beautiful match for light-to-medium skin with warm or neutral-warm undertones. It doesn’t pull too yellow or too pink, striking a nice, natural balance. Upon initial application, the shade was a perfect fit for my skin tone. The formula is incredibly lightweight and spreads with ease. A few gentle taps with the puff are enough to cover a large area. It blends seamlessly into the skin without needing much effort. ​With just one light layer, it provided solid medium coverage, effectively evening out my skin tone and toning down the redness around my nose. It’s also very buildable. I added a second, thinner layer over some darker spots, and it built up to near-full coverage without looking cakey or thick.
